families.repair: Moved reusable deterministic helpers into engine/runtime ownership, rewrote imports away from tools, and introduced runtime-owned network/transport/session/package helpers where safe.
Removed game-domain reference evaluators from engine foundation namespace.
Added substrate-local deterministic state-vector helpers inside engine compile support instead of importing game statevec.
Added runtime-owned product build identity helper and routed runtime descriptor generation through it.
Inlined runtime stability marker construction and removed the runtime copy of the tool validation shim.
Added exact path/from/to/edge exceptions with owners and retirement task.
Left as warning-only promotion/extraction debt; not a strict violation.
